title: When You Get to the Forest
original_title: When You Get to the Forest
overview: Overwhelmed, Dana takes to the road, leaving her past in the rearview mirror. Seeking solace she visits a hiking trail from her youth. A few wrong turns and a nasty fall later, she awakens alone in a strange forest, save for one new companion -- a talking cat. Dana explores the forest seeking a way out, back to the life she was running from.
